title: uiao-core Appendix Canon Schema
description: Validates the structure of appendices.yml for the Modernization Atlas.

title.description: Full title of the appendix pattern.

description.description: A clear narrative description of the standard.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the appendix.

owner.description: The agency team or individual owning the standard.

last_updated.description: Date of the last validation or change (YYYY-MM-DD).

source_file.description: Link or reference to the authoritative technical document.

config_snippet.description: The standardized YAML/Jinja2 block used in configuration generation.
